arts.ttl: Osimhen transfer ‘certain’ as Liverpool find €150m Salah sidekick
arts.sum: The transfer window is weeks away from opening, but there’s been big updates for many of the game’s biggest clubs, with Liverpool, Chelsea and Man Utd getting in the news. David Ornstein has revealed that the Gunners are chasing an England international as an alternative if they miss out on the Athletic Club star.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals reason Liverpool gave Mohamed Salah bumper contract extension - with £380,000-a-week star set to remain at Anfield until he is 35
arts.sum: Clubs are usually reluctant to continue paying players in their thirties around £350,000-a-week but Salah's statistics have improved with age as approaches his 33rd birthday.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists 'physical freak' Mo Salah will maintain level to end of new Liverpool deal
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has signed a new two-year deal to keep him at Liverpool until the end of the 2026-27 season - and Reds boss Arne Slot does not see his star turn slowing down

arts.ttl: Arne Slot lifts lid on Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold succession plan
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is set to leave Liverpool for Real Madrid this summer but Reds boss Arne Slot insists the club will not be panicked into the transfer market

arts.ttl: Arne Slot opens door to next exciting new Liverpool contract after Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Arne Slot signed a three-year deal when he joined Liverpool as their new manager last summer, but he is already raising the possibility of staying on at Anfield for longer

arts.ttl: Revealed: How Liverpool feel about future of key star who will be a free agent in 2026
arts.sum: Liverpool are hoping to agree on a new contract with star defender Ibrahima Konate in the coming weeks. The 25-year-old French international will be out of contract in 2026, and he has not signed an extension with Liverpool yet. arts.ttl: How Mohamed Salah's salary compares to rest of Premier League after new contract
arts.sum: How Mohamed Salah's new Liverpool salary compares to the rest of the Premier League after he extended his contract at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Liverpool can win Premier League title next week as Arsenal slip up again
arts.sum: Liverpool have inched closer to winning the Premier League without even playing as Arsenal dropped yet more points this weekend. The Gunners were held to a 1-1 draw by Brentford at home on Saturday after Thomas Partey’s second-half opener was cancelled out by Yoane Wissa. arts.ttl: Exclusive: West Ham among clubs to have made contact over £47m Bayern Munich player

arts.ttl: Report reveals Liverpool plan for 25-year-old target after Mo Salah extension
arts.sum: Liverpool remain keen on signing Alexander Isak from Newcastle United at the end of the season. The 25-year-old has been outstanding for Newcastle this season and has 24 goals and five assists to his name in all competitions.
